description: Source-aware air-quality recipes for OpenAQ v3 measurements, nearby monitor discovery, point comparison, and AirNow AQI setup/observations.

novel_features.name: OpenAQ current snapshot
novel_features.description: Finds a nearby OpenAQ location and returns latest physical pollutant measurements with source caveats.

novel_features.name: Nearby monitoring locations
novel_features.description: Lists nearby OpenAQ locations with provider, coordinate, and sensor metadata.

novel_features.name: Location latest measurements
novel_features.description: Fetches a known OpenAQ location by ID and its latest measurements.

novel_features.name: Recent sensor history
novel_features.description: Fetches a bounded recent OpenAQ measurement window for one sensor.

novel_features.name: Two-point comparison
novel_features.description: Compares nearest OpenAQ snapshots for two coordinate pairs without converting measurements into AQI.

novel_features.name: AirNow current AQI setup
novel_features.description: Fetches AirNow current observations by ZIP when configured and otherwise returns setup guidance with non-regulatory caveats.
